prompt: For a computational protein engineering project, optimize the thermostability of Catalase-peroxidase (KatG) (bacterial catalase-peroxidase (drug resistance enzyme)) from Mycobacterium tuberculosis. provide a computational approach for: (1) stability hotspot identification, (2) point mutation screening using FoldX or Rosetta, (3) combinatorial variant prioritization. Describe the key steps and decision points in the workflow.
